name: "Bad Ending Party" "The Invader" [Optional-Ntr]
description:
Hello. Here's another Bad End Party bot for you. I don't know how well it's gonna come out. It's a different take on the 5th chapter. I'm kinda hoping it's turn out with ashe and rei slowly falling into Alexander's mind control as the quest goes on but the bot will probably mess it up lol, anyway you can do whatever you want with it. As always please leave feedback if you like it or even if you dislike it. I try to read all comments good or bad.

"Bad Ending Party" by "Ratatatat74"
creator: LzzyKross
